differential_diagnoses: Septic shock (secondary to translocation/SIRS in cirrhosis)
next_steps: Send acute phase viral serologies including Dengue (NS1 and IgM/IgG), Chikungunya, and PCR for arboviruses
Send blood and urine PCR for Leptospira
Obtain serial thick and thin blood smears for malaria (due to possible rapid antigen test false negative)
Perform diagnostic paracentesis and analyze ascitic fluid (cell count, differential, culture, and protein/albumin)
Check serum ferritin, triglycerides, fibrinogen, and soluble IL-2 receptor levels to evaluate for HLH
Obtain formal transthoracic echocardiogram to better characterize myocardial function and valvular status
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotic and vasopressor support while monitoring for multi-organ failure
